label: Send Bulk SMS
description: Send SMS messages to multiple recipients. Supports same message to many recipients or individual messages.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.label: Sending Mode
parameters.help: Choose between sending the same message to multiple recipients or individual messages per recipient.

parameters.name: recipients
parameters.label: Recipients
parameters.help: List of phone numbers (for 'Same message' mode). Max 10,000 recipients.

parameters.name: messages
parameters.label: Messages
parameters.help: Array of individual messages (for 'Individual messages' mode). Max 100 messages.

parameters.name: from
parameters.label: Sender Name
parameters.help: Registered sender name (for 'Same message' mode). Leave empty for account default.

parameters.name: date
parameters.label: Schedule Date
parameters.help: Schedule sending for a future date/time (ISO 8601). Leave empty for immediate sending.

body: {{if(parameters.mode == 'same_message', toJSON(set(emptyObject, 'recipients', parameters.recipients, 'message', parameters.message, 'from', parameters.from, 'date', parameters.date, 'encoding', parameters.encoding)), toJSON(set(emptyObject, 'messages', parameters.messages)))}}
